disputed_language: Place production and development in separate member accounts ... add a distinct OU only when the regulated baseline is introduced.
explanation: An OU groups accounts; adding an OU does not explicitly create or place the future regulated workload in its separately required member account.
required_action: Explicitly place the regulated workload in its own member account and that account in the distinct control-aligned OU.

supporting_source.locator: Understanding AWS Organizations; Recommended foundational organizational unit (OUs)
supporting_source.title: Best practices for managing organizational units (OUs) with AWS Organizations
